basic_details.job_title: NIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Junior Project Technical Assistant, Senior Project Technical Assistant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Junior Project Technical Assistant, Senior Project Technical Assistant, Project Technical Assistant
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Delhi (NIT Delhi) Consultancy Project Positions Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Delhi. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Delhi Consultancy Project Positions Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Project Technical Assistant: B. Tech. (Electrical/ Mechanical) Sr. Project Technical Assistant: B. Tech. (Civil) Junior Project Technical Assistant: Diploma or Equivalent or Above (Electrical/Mechanical) Junior Project Technical Assistant: Diploma or Equivalent or Above (Civil)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for NIT Delhi Consultancy Project Positions?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Consultancy Project Positions at NIT Delhi is scheduled for 21 May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies announced by NIT Delhi?
faq.answer: NIT Delhi has announced a total of 6 vacancies for Consultancy Project Positions. These positions are spread across different roles like Project Technical Assistant and Junior Project Technical Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Project Technical Assistant post, candidates must possess a B. Tech. degree in Electrical or Mechanical engineering. This is a key requirement for eligibility for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Consultancy Project Positions at NIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The salary offered for these contractual positions ranges from Rs. 32,800/- to Rs. 42,600/- per month, depending on the specific post and experience of the selected candidate.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the NIT Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can attend the walk-in interview without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultancy Project Positions at NIT Delhi will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational certificates, ID proof, and any other relevant documents as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age limit relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification for any such information.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are contractual in nature. This means the employment is for a fixed tenure, as per the project requirements and terms of the consultancy project.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at National Institute of Technology Delhi. The exact venue address will be mentioned in the official notification, which candidates should refer to.
